description_long: This kiosk is a small, standalone commercial structure with a simple, boxy design, situated on a square plot with a paved walkway and surrounding grass. The front features a large glass display window showcasing various products, and a printed sign above the window reads 'CITY KIOSK' in bold letters. To the left of the entrance, there is a freestanding sign or menu board, likely used to attract customers or display daily specials. The side and rear walls are solid, with the rear wall featuring vertical colored stripes for visual interest. The roof is flat and slightly overhangs the front, providing minimal shelter. The overall color scheme is predominantly white with red accents, giving it a clean, modern appearance.
description: A compact, modern kiosk with a large front display window, flat roof, and bold signage, set on a paved and grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass display window, 'CITY KIOSK' signage, and a freestanding sign or menu board to the left.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the glass window, visible interior products, and the side of the freestanding sign.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back wall with vertical colored stripes and no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the side window, partial interior, and the edge of the freestanding sign.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign above entrance with 'CITY KIOSK' text; freestanding printed menu board to the left of the entrance.
attribute_window_presence: Two windows: one large rectangular window at the front, one smaller rectangular window on the right side.
attribute_door_configuration: Single door at the front, likely hinged, adjacent to the main display window.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with slight overhang at the front, constructed from metal or similar material, no visible decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with clean lines, simple geometric form, and bold color accents.
